release_review.summary: Runtime rich terminal presentation now exposes runtime version, protocol, workload counts, active sessions, provider link state, and real log tailing without changing the Runtime Service wire protocol.
checked_surfaces: Runtime rich presentation overview, activity metrics, access section, and narrow terminal layout
Runtime presentation active sessions panel, keyboard focus routing, filtering, and empty states
Runtime Service Snapshot workload counts for active sessions, terminal sessions, active AI runs, and port-forward sessions
Agent active session summary exported only for presentation and monitoring, not for authorization decisions
Control plane connect, disconnect, and bootstrap setup actions from the interactive terminal UI
Real runtime log ring buffer integration and expanded logs panel
Desktop-managed machine presentation and startup report paths remain separated from human terminal UI
Local UI health and runtime status endpoints continue to normalize the same Runtime Service protocol snapshot
Runtime Service compatibility contract fields and protocol version remain unchanged
release_review.same_window_rationale: The release changes terminal presentation, local in-process workload counting, and monitoring summaries only. It does not add, remove, or rename Runtime Service JSON fields, does not change the protocol version, and keeps Desktop attach/start, Local UI health, sys.ping, provider link, runtime-control, SSH runtime bootstrap, and startup report consumers on the existing compatibility window.
